subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of God! The sacrifice and devotion shown in service to the Blessed Beauty are truly a manifestation of the confirmations and power of the Most Great Name [3.5s]... ...Huquq is applied on everything one possesseth. However, if a person hath paid the Huquq on a certain property, and the income from that property is equal to his needs
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حق الحق جانفشانی و فداای جمال مبارک قوت تاییدات اسم اعظم مشاهده
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @law of Huququ'llah, @power of prayer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
